## Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My code follows the philosophy and style of this project
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally on **Chrome**
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally on **Firefox**

## LLM Review
- [ ] I understand that my PR will be automatically reviewed by an LLM bot. I take responsibility to review the problems it raises, fix them, or explicitly comment explaining why they are not problems.
